import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    # Tile and color constants
    BALL = 3
    PYRAMID = 5
    HEX = 11
    BLUE = 3
    GREEN = 2
    YELLOW = 5
    FLOOR = 1

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # --- Check if agent is holding a green ball (picked up blue pyramid) ---
    holding_green_ball = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    prev_holding_green_ball = (state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)

    # --- Find blue pyramid on grid ---
    blue_pyramid_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    blue_pyramid_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyramid_mask)
    bp_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyramid_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyramid_count, 1)
    bp_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyramid_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyramid_count, 1)

    # --- Find yellow hex on grid ---
    yellow_hex_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yellow_hex_count = jnp.sum(yellow_hex_mask)
    yh_y = jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1)
    yh_x = jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1)

    agent_y = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Phase 1: Navigate to blue pyramid ---
    dist_to_bp = jnp.abs(agent_y - bp_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - bp_x)
    # Normalize by grid size
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)
    dist_to_bp_norm = dist_to_bp / max_dist

    # --- Phase 2: Navigate to yellow hex (while holding green ball) ---
    dist_to_yh = jnp.abs(agent_y - yh_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yh_x)
    dist_to_yh_norm = dist_to_yh / max_dist

    # --- Check if green ball was placed adjacent to yellow hex ---
    # Look for a green ball on the grid (placed down) adjacent to yellow hex
    green_ball_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    
    # Check adjacency: for each green ball, check if it's adjacent to yellow hex
    # Adjacent means Manhattan distance == 1
    gb_y_float = jnp.sum(yy.astype(jnp.float32) * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(green_ball_mask), 1)
    gb_x_float = jnp.sum(xx.astype(jnp.float32) * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(green_ball_mask), 1)
    
    dist_gb_to_yh = jnp.abs(gb_y_float - yh_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x_float - yh_x)
    
    # Green ball exists on grid (was placed) and is adjacent to yellow hex
    green_ball_on_grid = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask) > 0
    ball_adjacent_to_hex = (dist_gb_to_yh <= 1.5)  # Manhattan dist <= 1
    task_complete = green_ball_on_grid & ball_adjacent_to_hex

    # --- Milestone: just picked up the blue pyramid ---
    just_picked_up = holding_green_ball & ~prev_holding_green_ball

    # --- Reward computation ---
    reward = jnp.float32(0.0)

    # Phase 1: Dense shaping — move toward blue pyramid (only if not holding)
    prev_bp_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    prev_bp_count = jnp.sum(prev_bp_mask)
    prev_bp_y = jnp.sum(yy * prev_bp_mask) / jnp.maximum(prev_bp_count, 1)
    prev_bp_x = jnp.sum(xx * prev_bp_mask) / jnp.maximum(prev_bp_count, 1)
    prev_agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    prev_agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    prev_dist_to_bp = jnp.abs(prev_agent_y - prev_bp_y) + jnp.abs(prev_agent_x - prev_bp_x)
    prev_dist_to_bp_norm = prev_dist_to_bp / max_dist

    approach_bp_reward = (prev_dist_to_bp_norm - dist_to_bp_norm) * jnp.float32(0.5)

    # Phase 2: Dense shaping — move toward yellow hex (only if holding green ball)
    prev_dist_to_yh = jnp.abs(prev_agent_y - yh_y) + jnp.abs(prev_agent_x - yh_x)
    prev_dist_to_yh_norm = prev_dist_to_yh / max_dist
    approach_yh_reward = (prev_dist_to_yh_norm - dist_to_yh_norm) * jnp.float32(0.5)

    # Apply phase 1 reward only when not holding green ball and blue pyramid exists
    phase1_active = ~holding_green_ball & (blue_pyramid_count > 0)
    reward = reward + jnp.where(phase1_active, approach_bp_reward, jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Milestone: picked up blue pyramid
    reward = reward + jnp.where(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Apply phase 2 reward only when holding green ball
    reward = reward + jnp.where(holding_green_ball, approach_yh_reward, jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Task completion bonus
    reward = reward + jnp.where(task_complete, jnp.float32(5.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    return reward.astype(jnp.float32)
